themes.topic: SK Hynix CEO Forecasts Memory Shortage Until 2030s
themes.summary: SK Hynix's CEO stated that memory chip shortages are expected to persist past 2030 due to demand outpacing supply, leading to long-term contracts and a structural shift in the memory market.

mentions.text:
Memory shortage to last until 2030's:

“The rate at which demand is increasing far exceeds the speed at which we can increase supply.”

themes.topic: Taiwan's Semiconductor & Chip Equipment Export/Import Surge
themes.summary: Taiwan's semiconductor exports surged over 33% year-on-year in June to $24.11 billion, with chip equipment imports also rising significantly, driven by blockbuster demand for AI-related goods.
